rulings.Case Title: ADOLOFO URTECHO et al VS. LUIS SEGURA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Awarding Attorneys Fees And Costs

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 29, 2015, Line 4 ( Part 3 of 4). DEFENDANT CATALINA BOYKIN, ARTURO QUIZMUNDO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment is DENIED. Defendant's Motion for summary adjudication is denied. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) ("the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts.") . Motion for summary judgment is DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to material facts , 33, 34, 35, 37, 39. Regarding Sam's objections to evidence submitted by the moving party, the Court notes that objections are not in compliance with CRC 3.1354(b). =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interogatories, And For Sanctions; Mewmorrandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Tiffany R. Norman
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 29, 2015, Line 4 ( Part 4 of 4). DEFENDANT CATALINA BOYKIN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interogatories, And For Sanctions; Mewmorrandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Tiffany R. Norman is GRANTED. Cross-Defendant shall provide further responses to Special Interrogatories 41, 95,122, and 125. Sanctions are awarded against Cross-Defendant He and her counsel in the amount of $2,125.88. =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. CATALINA BOYKIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 29, 2015, Line 4 (Part 2 of 4). PLAINTIFF DIANA SAM MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues is DENIED. Motion for summary judgment of complaint is denied. No authority is cited for the proposition that summary judgment may be granted only as to some of the causes of action currently alleged in the complaint. Motion for summary adjudication of the causes of action in complaint and cross-complaint is denied. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) ("the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts.") Motion for summary judgment on the cross-complaint is denied. Moving party failed to shift burden. The only proof re: Issue number 3, fact 1 is Sam's declaration regarding her intent or lack thereof. CCP 437c(e). In the alternative, there is a triable issue of fact as to fact 1 of issue number 3 re: outrageousness of the conduct and reckless disregard of the probability of causing emotional distress. =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ESTRELLA REYES DE JESUS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 29, 2015, Line 8. rulings.Case Title: REY P. IBAY VS. RODOLFO P. IBAY, JR. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 29, 2015, Line 11. DEFENDANT RODOLFO IBAY, JR., ELVIRA IBAY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Additionally, moving party improperly raises issues of fact re: applicability of SFRO to owners residing in the same rental units as defendants. SFRO 37.9(b); and Defendants' status as tenants. =(501/RAW)
